changelog: Fix: Settings FQDN/port now save correctly (ENV_FILE resolved relative to module, not hardcoded /opt path)
Fix: Server settings save no longer returns 500 when UrBackup API is unreachable
Fix: Update notification reappears on hard refresh (state-only dismissal, no localStorage)
Fix: Update notification persists across page navigation (App-level instance)
Fix: auto-update now syncs version.json so /api/version reports correct installed version
Fix: Production systemd service installed and enabled
Fix: npm audit — all high/critical vulnerabilities resolved via overrides (minimatch, tar)
Fix: GitHub API includes GITHUB_TOKEN for higher rate limits on update checks
